title: Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates:
Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates!
